src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Refactor Spring Security configuration from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required for Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity annotation with the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation introduced in Spring Security 5.7.
Replace the deprecated authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() methods with the new authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers() methods.
Replace the deprecated headers() configuration style with the new lambda-based headers() configuration and update featurePolicy to permissionsPolicy.
Replace the deprecated csrf() configuration style with the new lambda-based csrf() configuration and add CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler.
Replace the deprecated exceptionHandling() configuration style with the new lambda-based exceptionHandling() configuration using HttpStatusEntryPoint.
Replace the deprecated formLogin() configuration style with the new lambda-based formLogin() configuration and inline success/failure handlers.
Replace the deprecated logout() configuration style with the new lambda-based logout() configuration using HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
Replace the deprecated rememberMe() configuration style with the new lambda-based rememberMe() configuration.
Remove the extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter and the configure(WebSecurity web) method, moving ignored paths to the main filter chain or removing them if no longer needed.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
